---
title: "Cibersort Proteomics"
author: "Shubham Agrawal"
date: "2026-07-14"
output:
  BiocStyle::html_document:
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: "hide"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(CIBERSORT)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
```

# Load the dds object

```{r}
se <- readRDS("objects/protoemics.Rds")
se
```
```{r}
protMat <- assay(se)
head(protMat)
```
```{r}
rd <- rowData(se)
head(rd)
```
```{r}
dim(rd)
length(unique(rd$Gene))
length(unique(rd$ProteinID))
```
```{r}
gene <- rd$Gene
```

```{r}
df <- data.frame(
  gene = gene,
  protMat,
  check.names = FALSE
)

# Average proteins mapping to the same gene
expr_gene <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(gene), gene != "") %>%
  group_by(gene) %>%
  summarise(across(where(is.numeric), ~mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)),
            .groups = "drop")

expr_gene <- as.data.frame(expr_gene)
rownames(expr_gene) <- expr_gene$gene
expr_gene$gene <- NULL
```

```{r}
input_matrix <- data.frame(GeneSymbol = rownames(expr_gene),
                           expr_gene,
                           check.names = FALSE)

write.table(input_matrix,
            file = "ALL_PROT_for_CIBERSORTx.txt",
            sep = "\t",
            quote = FALSE,
            row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
sig_matrix <- system.file("extdata", "LM22.txt", package = "CIBERSORT")
results <- cibersort(sig_matrix, "ALL_PROT_for_CIBERSORTx.txt")
```

```{r}
head(results)
```

```{r}
results <- as.data.frame(results)
results$Total_Bcells <- results$`B cells naive` +
                        results$`B cells memory` +
                        results$`Plasma cells`

results$Total_Tcells <- results$`T cells CD8` +
                        results$`T cells CD4 naive` +
                        results$`T cells CD4 memory resting` +
                        results$`T cells CD4 memory activated` +
                        results$`T cells follicular helper` +
                        results$`T cells regulatory (Tregs)`
```


```{r}
ggplot(results, aes(x = Total_Bcells, y = Total_Tcells)) +
  geom_point() +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Total B-cell fraction",
       y = "Total T-cell fraction")
```
```{r}
# Remove non-cell columns
cell_fraction <- results[, !colnames(results) %in% 
                           c("P-value", "Correlation", "RMSE", "Absolute score")]
```


```{r}
dim(cell_fraction)
colnames(cell_fraction)
```
```{r}
metadata <- as.data.frame(colData(se))
head(metadata$diseaseType)
```

```{r}
metadata <- metadata[rownames(results), , drop = FALSE]
all(rownames(metadata) == rownames(results))
```
```{r}
annotation_df <- data.frame(Disease = metadata$diseaseType)
rownames(annotation_df) <- rownames(metadata)
```



```{r}
cell_scaled <- t(scale(t(cell_fraction)))

pheatmap(cell_scaled,
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_row = annotation_df,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("navy", "white", "firebrick3"))(100),
         fontsize_row = 8,
         fontsize_col = 8,
         main = "CIBERSORTx Cell-Type Proportions (ALL)")
```
```{r}
pheatmap(cell_fraction,
         cluster_rows = TRUE,
         cluster_cols = TRUE,
         annotation_row = annotation_df,
         color = colorRampPalette(c("white", "orange", "red"))(100),
         main = "Immune Cell Fractions (Raw Proportions)")
```
